task: Launch-quality advanced task: Stability Shelf-Life Regression Reanalysis. Reality context: a stability program must justify expiry after a new 12-month data point. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=assay_pct_label, metric2=month, metric3=storage_temp_C, metric4=prediction_interval_width; records: R1 assay_pct_label=30.3 month=128 storage_temp_C=71.9 prediction_interval_width=64.35; R2 assay_pct_label=36.4 month=42 storage_temp_C=69.8 prediction_interval_width=25.75; R3 assay_pct_label=30.9 month=162 storage_temp_C=28 prediction_interval_width=4.37; R4 assay_pct_label=68 month=149 storage_temp_C=68.7 prediction_interval_width=73.08; limit_assay_pct_label=65.8; limit_month=165; limit_storage_temp_C=69.6; decision_budget_usd=272500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="application note supplied engineering limits that must be turned into checks". Rules and constraints: Compute margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3); negative margin is fail and margin below 8% of the largest driver is warn. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: estimate shelf life and risk; build a reproducible workbook or script, preserve intermediate calculations, and produce an expert-review memo. Deliver shelf_life_reanalysis.xlsx + qa_memo.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
